issue_title: Tooltip sticks When Element is destroyed
issue_body_preview:
Hey, I am using tooltip in my navbar and I have two layout.
1. With navbar
2. No Navbar

I have button in navbar which navigates to another layout which dont have any navbar.(So, when I click on btn, btn it self and navbar gets destroyed). But that tooltip which I used on button still remain.
test_description_zh: 在带有导航栏的页面中，将鼠标悬停在带有 Tooltip 的导航栏按钮上触发 Tooltip 显示，然后点击该按钮导航到没有导航栏的另一个布局页面，观察页面上是否还残留 Tooltip 元素。
expected_result_zh: 当按钮和导航栏被销毁后，与该按钮关联的 Tooltip 应自动消失，不应在页面上残留任何 Tooltip 元素。
